Functions for JSON serialization, deserialization, and tagging with Flask app context support.


## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Functions for JSON serialization and deserialization, with support for Flask app context overrides.
- **[provider.py](provider.py.md)**: Implements JSON operations for Flask applications, allowing customization and additional data type serialization.
- **[tag.py](tag.py.md)**: Implements a system for tagging and serializing non-standard JSON types using a compact representation.
